author: @docink6175
text: magic for me, I saw orange, purple and green but I know I see colors different than most people. I have a complicated form or colorblindness thats not just red/green or blue/yellow.. I paused it and on the right is red purple green and the left purple green orange

author: @markwritt8541
text: It works with celery and food coloring, as well.

replies.author: @mikeyd717
replies.text: works with all PLANTS and food coloring. to varying degree of visible reactionbwhite hydrangeas work the best. you can split the stems and have multicolors on one flower of you split the stems and stick them in separate. solutions.
